assertions.title: ACP transport — spawn `pi-acp` over SSH and complete ACP lifecycle

steps.expected: Full ACP lifecycle completes without protocol errors, NDJSON messages correctly framed

assertions.title: Native transport — spawn `pi --mode rpc` and verify JSONL command/response correlation

steps.expected: Sends prompt, receives correlated streaming events, correct JSONL framing

assertions.title: Error handling — Pi process crash mid-session

steps.expected: ProviderEvent emitted, no panic, no deadlock, previously received items preserved

assertions.title: Error handling — SSH disconnect mid-session with reconnect

steps.expected: TransportDisconnected emitted, reconnect attempt, no panic

assertions.title: Error handling — malformed JSONL from Pi process

steps.expected: Logs warnings, processes valid events, no panic — both malformed JSON and unknown event type handled
steps.observed: test provider::pi::transport::tests::pi_malformed_jsonl ... ok, test provider::pi::transport::tests::pi_malformed_jsonl_unknown_event_type ... ok — 2 passed, 0 failed

assertions.title: Full Pi event lifecycle mapping — agent_start through agent_end

steps.expected: Hydrated conversation contains user message, reasoning, assistant message, command execution — correct ordering and content

summary: Tested 6 assertions (7 individual tests): all passed. VAL-PI-001 (ACP lifecycle), VAL-PI-002 (native JSONL framing), VAL-PI-009 (process crash), VAL-PI-010 (SSH disconnect), VAL-PI-011 (malformed JSONL — 2 tests), VAL-PI-012 (full lifecycle mapping) all completed successfully with no failures, panics, or protocol errors.
